creator: zaa@zaa.pp.ru
text:
FYI.

	I've checked /usr/src/usr.sbin/nscd folder on my system (which contains checkout of CURRENT source tree) 
	and saw a file without a file extension: 

	wave:...usr.sbin/nscd# env -i ls -l mp_rs_query.
	-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  1604 Sep 27 16:30 mp_rs_query.

	I guess it was left in source tree by an incident as the file is not being referenced
	by other files in the directory and the nscd application was compiled correctly without this file.
